TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tukus, title = tukus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tukus} }

S.FORM: tukus namakayniyan a nasulitan nasakamuwan atu natinengan Wikipayke paybalucu'ay pulungamin a cudad-陸地
S.PHON: tukus namakajnijan a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuwan atu natinəŋan wikipajkə pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj pur~ɾuŋamin a ʦudad-**

S.PHON: tukus namakajnijan a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuwan atu natinəŋan wikipajkə pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj pur~ɾuŋamin a ʦudad-**
